title: Marilaunidium parryi
intro: I couldn't find any information about the plant Marilaunidium parryi.
preparations: Marilaunidium parryi is not a known plant, however,  I was able to find information about Parrya parryi.  Herbal preparations of Parrya parryi, also known as the Parry's stonecrop, are not well-documented, but it is used in some herbal remedies for its supposed medicinal properties. Some herbalists believe that the plant has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures.
